title: Dear Avani
paragraphs: Happy Birthday, Avani.^1000 I made this little website because I wanted your birthday wish to feel special, thoughtful, and different.
You are someone who makes life feel brighter in the simplest ways.
Your smile, your kindness, and the way you make people around you feel comfortable are all so special.
I hope today gives you the same warmth that you bring into other people's lives.
We all wanted you to feel celebrated, loved, and remembered today.
May this birthday bring you peace, laughter, good health, and every beautiful thing your heart is waiting for.
Keep smiling, birthday girl.^1000 You deserve a day as lovely as you are.
Happy Birthday again, Avani.^1000 With love, from me.
